message:
fix(tests): prevent conformance summary overwrite on CI + macOS fs test path

- conformance_report: guard read_or_regenerate_conformance_events()
  against regenerating on CI (would overwrite summary with zeros,
  failing release_evidence_gate threshold check)
- extensions_fs_shim: use /usr instead of /etc/hosts for outside-root
  stat test (macOS resolves /etc/hosts differently)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
